title: carpinus fargesiana var. ovalifolia
intro: Carpinus fargesiana var. ovalifolia, also known as Farges' hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Carpinus fargesiana var. ovalifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by making teas or infusions from its leaves and bark, which can also be used to treat various health conditions.
